MOTION Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint;
Off Calendar Feb-26-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael Chapnik, Esq., 831-4747, specially appearing for defendant Robin A. Caldwell, moving to quash service of summons and complaint

RULING:
Moving party did not notify plaintiff's counsel of his intention to argue in this hearing. the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT ROBIN A CALDWELL's MOTION To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint -- Denied. Upon request of counsel the Court allowed counsel 15 days leave to answer or otherwise respond. (DAG/301/KG-X) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
